basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 878 Anganwadi Helper / Ayah Posts in Bhadradri Kothagudem District
basic_details.organization_name: District Welfare Officer, Women Development, Child Welfare (WDCW) & SC Welfare, Bhadradri Kothagudem
basic_details.short_information: The Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is being conducted to fill vacant Anganwadi Helper posts under the ICDS scheme in the district. Below is a quick overview of the notification.

important_dates.raw: Candidates applying for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah posts should note the following key dates carefully, as applications will be accepted only during the specified window. | Notification Release Date: 18 July 2026 (announced by the District Welfare Officer) Online Application Start Date: 20 July 2026 Online Application Last Date: 1 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM Original Certificate Verification (Scrutiny): 3 August 2026 to 14 August 2026

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026. As this is typically a fee-free recruitment process for Anganwadi Helper posts, candidates should verify fee details, if any, on the official application portal at the time of applying.

age_limit.details: The age limit for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is between 18 and 35 years. Age relaxation rules for reserved categories, if applicable, are not specified in the notification; candidates are advised to confirm this with the concerned ICDS Project Office.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for the Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) post must have passed Intermediate (10+2) from a recognized board.

salary_details.details: The official notification does not mention the specific salary or honorarium for the Anganwadi Ayah (Helper) post. Anganwadi Helpers in Telangana are generally paid a fixed monthly honorarium as per state government norms, which is revised periodically. Candidates are advised to contact the concerned ICDS Project Office for the current honorarium applicable to this recruitment.

selection_process: the selection process for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah posts involves the following steps:

Submission of online application within the given window (20 July 2026 to 1 August 2026). Verification of original certificates by the concerned authorities between 3 August 2026 and 14 August 2026. Preparation of merit list and selection as per applicable government norms for Anganwadi Helper recruitment.
have not been specified in the notification; candidates should check with the ICDS Project Office for further procedural details.
how_to_apply: Eligible women candidates can apply for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah (AWH) recruitment 2026 by following the steps below:
Applications must be submitted online only through the designated website, as informed in the official notification.
Check eligibility, vacancy details, and reserved category for the Anganwadi Centre of your habitation before applying.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and residential details.
Submit the application within the window open between 20 July 2026 and 1 August 2026 (up to 5:00 PM).
Keep a printout/acknowledgment of the submitted application for future reference.
Report for original certificate verification at the notified venue between 3 August 2026 and 14 August 2026, along with all original documents.

For full details on the website link, application form, and portal, candidates should contact the concerned ICDS Project Office in their mandal, as the official notification directs applicants to approach the ICDS Project Office for complete details and clarifications.
important_instructions: Applications will be accepted only through the online mode; no offline or manual applications will be entertained. Candidates should apply only for Anganwadi Centres located in their own habitation, as required by the eligibility norms. Keep all original certificates ready well in advance of the verification dates (3–14 August 2026). Regularly check the official website and contact the ICDS Project Office for updates, corrigenda, or changes to the schedule. Details regarding eligibility, vacancy position, and other information are available on the official website as mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah (AWH) Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is being conducted to fill vacant Anganwadi Helper posts under the ICDS scheme in the district. Below is a quick overview of the notification.

rows.details: District Welfare Officer, Women Development, Child Welfare (WDCW) & SC Welfare, Bhadradri Kothagudem

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah posts should note the following key dates carefully, as applications will be accepted only during the specified window. Notification Release Date: 18 July 2026 (announced by the District Welfare Officer) Online Application Start Date: 20 July 2026 Online Application Last Date: 1 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM Original Certificate Verification (Scrutiny): 3 August 2026 to 14 August 2026

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details (Project-wise)
content_sections.text: A total of 878 Anganwadi Ayah (Helper) vacancies have been notified across 11 ICDS projects in Bhadradri Kothagudem district. The project-wise number of vacancies is given in the table below. Each vacancy in the official list is further specified by mandal, sector, Anganwadi Centre (AWC) ID, AWC name, and the reservation category (SC, ST, BC-A/B/C/D/E, OC/General, EWS, VH, HH, EX-S/OC, etc.) for that particular post. Candidates should refer to the detailed AWC-wise list published by the district office to check the exact centre, sector, and reserved category applicable to the post they wish to apply for, since vacancies are habitation-specific.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: To apply for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah (AWH) recruitment 2026, candidates must fulfill the following eligibility conditions as stated in the official notification: The applicant must be a woman candidate . The applicant must be a permanent resident of the same habitation for which the Anganwadi Ayah post is vacant. The applicant must meet the educational qualification and age limit prescribed below.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) post must have passed Intermediate (10+2) from a recognized board.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age limit for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is between 18 and 35 years . Age relaxation rules for reserved categories, if applicable, are not specified in the notification; candidates are advised to confirm this with the concerned ICDS Project Office.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention the specific salary or honorarium for the Anganwadi Ayah (Helper) post. Anganwadi Helpers in Telangana are generally paid a fixed monthly honorarium as per state government norms, which is revised periodically. Candidates are advised to contact the concerned ICDS Project Office for the current honorarium applicable to this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026. As this is typically a fee-free recruitment process for Anganwadi Helper posts, candidates should verify fee details, if any, on the official application portal at the time of applying.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Based on the official notification, the selection process for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah posts involves the following steps: Submission of online application within the given window (20 July 2026 to 1 August 2026). Verification of original certificates by the concerned authorities between 3 August 2026 and 14 August 2026. Preparation of merit list and selection as per applicable government norms for Anganwadi Helper recruitment. Detailed marks-based selection criteria, if any, have not been specified in the notification; candidates should check with the ICDS Project Office for further procedural details.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates should keep the following original documents and photocopies ready for the certificate verification process: Intermediate (10+2) pass certificate/memo Date of birth proof (SSC certificate or equivalent) Residence/habitation proof of the concerned Anganwadi Centre area Caste certificate (for reserved category applicants, if applicable) Aadhaar card Recent passport-size photographs Any other documents specified by the ICDS Project Office

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible women candidates can apply for the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah (AWH) recruitment 2026 by following the steps below: Applications must be submitted online only through the designated website, as informed in the official notification. Check eligibility, vacancy details, and reserved category for the Anganwadi Centre of your habitation before applying. Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and residential details. Submit the application within the window open between 20 July 2026 and 1 August 2026 (up to 5:00 PM). Keep a printout/acknowledgment of the submitted application for future reference. Report for original certificate verification at the notified venue between 3 August 2026 and 14 August 2026, along with all original documents. For full details on the website link, application form, and portal, candidates should contact the concerned ICDS Project Office in their mandal, as the official notification directs applicants to approach the ICDS Project Office for complete details and clarifications.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications will be accepted only through the online mode ; no offline or manual applications will be entertained. Candidates should apply only for Anganwadi Centres located in their own habitation, as required by the eligibility norms. Keep all original certificates ready well in advance of the verification dates (3–14 August 2026). Regularly check the official website and contact the ICDS Project Office for updates, corrigenda, or changes to the schedule. Details regarding eligibility, vacancy position, and other information are available on the official website as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Ayah vacancies are there in Bhadradri Kothagudem 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 878 Anganwadi Ayah (Helper) vacancies across 11 ICDS projects in Bhadradri Kothagudem district.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 18 and 35 years as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Anganwadi Ayah post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (10+2) to be eligible for the Anganwadi Ayah (Helper) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 1 August 2026, before 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q5. Is this recruitment open to men as well?
faq.answer: No, the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is open only to women candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Do candidates need to reside in the same area as the Anganwadi Centre?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must be residents of the same habitation where the Anganwadi Ayah post is vacant.

faq.question: Q7. When will certificate verification take place?
faq.answer: Original certificate verification will be conducted from 3 August 2026 to 14 August 2026.
